title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Turning Point

dialogue.text: waves!! Artificial waves from inside these walls!!

dialogue.text: HAA... I'm fine, it disap- peared ....!!

dialogue.text: Where are we!? What happened to us...?
